name: A
notes: Profile for model 'A' (models/A.pth). Verified v2 / 768-dim / sr=40k / f0-conditioned. pitch_shift=12 is the SELLER-recommended setting (range 10-14); A is a high/female-range model and at pitch 0 it collapsed to a neutral/metallic (电音) timbre -- +12 puts the input F0 in the model's trained range. Tune 10-14 per voice via --pitch. index_rate=0.08: a LIGHT retrieval blend (ear-picked); the engine loads models/V2.index because the rate is > 0. The earlier A/B verdict was that heavy retrieval averaged identity away -- keep this small or set 0.0 to disable. target_f0_median=200 is the A2 auto-center seed (hand-seeded; the emb_pitch weight-probe was NO-GO, see docs/f0_remap_plan.md): when the GUI auto-center toggle is on, the engine transposes the user's median F0 to ~200 Hz, REPLACING pitch_shift (no double-shift). FORMANT (性别因子): formant_timbre is the stftpitchshift distortion = a DIRECT formant-frequency multiplier (measured: centroidRatio ~= value); >1.0 = formants up (feminine), <1.0 = down. 1.19 is the ear-picked M->F value (target band ~1.15-1.25, tools/measure_formant.py); the seller's '0.25' is WRONG for this engine (it would shift formants DOWN to ~0.28x). Paths are relative to the project root.
